case_title: SAMSON, TEOFILO et al vs. MILLOT, FREDERIC MARCEL et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER & ORDER THE CASE DESIGNATED AS UNINSURED MOTORIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAMSON, TEOFILO
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-09-1995, CONTINUED TO APR-10-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PURSUANT TO RULE 301(C) RULES OF COURT, UNINSURED MOTORIST PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-09-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAY-09-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE PER CCP 575.2: AS TO WHY THIS ACTION SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED AND TO RESPOND TO THE COURT'S FACT FINDING INQUIRY INTO COUNSEL'S ROLE IN THE ABOVE MENTIONED PARTY'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE TRIAL COURT DELAY REDUCTION ACT AND THE LOCAL RULES OF COURT., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-31-1996 CONTINUED FROM MAY-09-1996 TO JUN-10-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
CHANGE OF LAW FIRM NAME-PLTFS-TEOFILO SAMSON & R. SAMSON
